name: 社会规范与意识形态
description: 用于描述规范、性别意识形态、角色期待如何塑造行为及其不平等后果。

clusters.meaning: 性别规范和父母身份期待

expressions.note: 高频基础搭配，可与 persist/entrenched/reinforce/shape 连用。
expressions.example: Traditional gender norms shape policy take-up.

expressions.note: 语气强于 persistent，适合规范、结构和不平等。
expressions.example: Entrenched norms shape household labor.

expressions.note: 比 gender attitudes 更贴近未来配偶/家庭分工期待。
expressions.example: Policy effects depend on gender-role preferences.

expressions.note: 比 gender expectations 更具体，适合说明母职和父职差异。
expressions.example: Gendered expectations of parenthood shape FWA use.

expressions.note: 概念性强，常用于解释母亲照护负担。
expressions.example: Intensive mothering reinforces caregiving burdens.

expressions.note: 适合描述父职规范正在变化，但不必然改变行为。
expressions.example: Emerging norms of involved fathering may affect men.

clusters.meaning: 意识形态一致性及其向行为的转化

expressions.note: 一个表达同时覆盖 alignment 和 disalignment，适合配对比较。
expressions.example: We compare couples with ideological (dis)alignment.

expressions.note: align in 比 have similar 更紧凑，常用于配对关系。
expressions.example: Spouses align in egalitarian gender ideology.

expressions.note: 适合解释态度和实际行动之间的落差。
expressions.example: Resources shape the translation of ideology into behavior.

expressions.note: 适合 planned behavior theory，也可写社会期待对行为的约束。
expressions.example: Normative pressure encourages family formation.

expressions.note: 适合两个机制、伴侣特征或政策工具互动时使用。
expressions.example: Spouses' ideologies can reinforce or offset each other.

expressions.en: gender ideology is a multidimensional construct
expressions.note: 适合测量和理论段，避免把态度变量写得过于单一。
expressions.example: Gender ideology is a multidimensional construct.

clusters.meaning: 性别角色、男性身份和规范解释力

expressions.note: 比 male provider 更常见，适合说明男性身份和工作规范。
expressions.example: FWA use may threaten the breadwinner role.

expressions.note: 用于解释男性为何避免使用家庭友好政策，语气较理论化。
expressions.example: Men may avoid flexibility to protect masculine standing.

expressions.note: trump 强调解释力更强，适合讨论规范与资源的竞争。
expressions.example: Gender norms can trump economic explanations.

expressions.note: 适合说明一个概念需要分开测量或解释。
expressions.example: Preferences may have multiple distinct dimensions.

expressions.note: 比 continue 更有因果色彩，常接 inequality/norms。
expressions.example: Workplace norms may perpetuate gender inequality.

clusters.meaning: 性别革命、平等实践和理论贡献

expressions.note: 表达强，适合讨论制度如何延续不平等；不宜用于弱结果。
expressions.example: Policy design may stall gender revolution.

expressions.note: 区别于口头支持平等，强调行为层面的 egalitarianism。
expressions.example: Men need to do gender egalitarianism at home.

expressions.note: 强调分工过程看似中性但结果仍可能性别化。
expressions.example: Process-focused gender equality may still reproduce inequality.

expressions.note: 比 make ideology egalitarian 更学术，适合宏观趋势讨论。
expressions.example: It is insufficient to de-traditionalise gender ideology alone.

expressions.en: turn gender asymmetry into a theoretical contribution
expressions.note: 适合讨论段从结果差异推进到概念或理论修正。
expressions.example: Gender asymmetry becomes a theoretical contribution.

clusters.meaning: 性别规范、父母身份期待和性别化社会化

expressions.note: 适合和 resource bargaining、gender norms 对照使用。
expressions.example: Household specialization explains couples' labor arrangements.

expressions.note: 常与经济利益解释竞争，适合理论比较。
expressions.example: The doing gender perspective received limited support.

expressions.en: Contrast practical needs with gender norms.
expressions.note: 适合讨论结果为何不符合 conventional expectation。
expressions.example: Practical needs may override traditional gender norms.

expressions.note: 适合写实践需求、经济利益或制度约束压过规范期待。
expressions.example: Practical needs may override traditional gender norms.

expressions.note: 比 dominant 更理论化，常用于性别、男性气质和权力关系。
expressions.example: Men may become less attached to hegemonic norms.

clusters.meaning: 现实需求、权力动态和规范期待之间的竞争解释

expressions.note: 用于解释为什么同一事件对男女意义不同。
expressions.example: Gendered socialization shapes responses to dissolution.

expressions.note: 适合解释 parenthood 的调节效应为何有性别差异。
expressions.example: Gendered parenthood expectations may intensify distress.

expressions.note: 比 gender relationship 更理论化，强调关系中的权力变化。
expressions.example: Education changes gender relations and power dynamics.

expressions.note: 适合解释男性身份、婚配偏好和家庭权力。
expressions.example: Men may be less attached to male hegemonic norms.

expressions.note: 用于引入规范之外的替代机制，如经济需求或地位流动。
expressions.example: Aside from traditional norms, practical needs matter.
